---
title: "The Hon. Cordelia Anne L'Estrange Colborne"
---

## The Hon. Cordelia Anne L'Estrange Colborne

**Dates:** (1824/5-30 May 1862)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

The daughter of the 1st Lord Seaton [tombstone Holy Cross, Newton Ferrars; PB 1914]

### Letters

- Letter from October 3. [1857]
- Letter from October 1, 1857
- Letter from Thursday 1st Oct [1857]
- Letter from 26 Septr 1857
- Letter from <b>Error! Bookmark not defined</b>.OtterbournMarch 31st [1855]
- Letter from Decr 14th [1853]
- Letter from July 22d [1845[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from April 19th  [1845[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
